title: Overstacked Enchantments
description: Removes the default limit of 15 bookshelves for enchanting
body:
This mod removes the default limit of 15 bookshelves. Now you can have as many bookshelves as you want, but you can only place up to 32 that the enchanting table will actually use, due to minecraft's bookshelf placement logic.

Unfortunately though, you still can't get treasure enchants like mending, and if you use all 32 bookshelves, a lot of the time the enchants you get are garbage. Like, half of the items only give you unbreaking 3 (like armor, tridents, crossbow), so you might not want to use 32 bookshelves.


*Once I discovered these issues I decided I don't even care about using this mod anymore, but I figured I might as well upload it for any of you guys who want it (:
